error_signature: output data not usable by subsequent nodes
title: Output from Convert to File not usable in workflow
symptom: The Convert to File node successfully creates a file, but the output data is empty, making it unusable for further nodes in the workflow.
not_this_if: Output data is correctly formatted for subsequent nodes
root_cause: The Convert to File node may not format its output correctly for downstream nodes, leading to empty JSON outputs that cannot be processed further in the workflow.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node to the workflow
Set the Merge node to combine mode
Connect the output of the Convert to File node to the Merge node
Test the workflow to ensure data is now accessible
agent_instruction: Insert a Merge node in combine mode after the Convert to File node to make the output usable.
